title: Characterize ESP32-S3 ELF and peripheral gaps
description: For Heltec V3 and T-Deck canonical ELFs, record program headers, expected address regions, entry/vector state, unmapped loads, and first required peripheral accesses against the current skeletal Renode platform.
acceptance_criteria: Produce a retained machine-readable address/peripheral gap inventory tied to exact ELF hashes, with ordered minimum model milestones for UART boot, interrupts/timers, SPI/GPIO, and SX1262 TX; no surrogate boot claim.
